caption: A woman with short black hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved top with red and blue embroidery along the neckline and a small black necklace. A thin black lavalier microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a small circular logo contains the text "NPTEL". As the video progresses, the woman gestures with her hands to emphasize her points. Initially, her right hand is slightly raised and her left hand is open. She continues talking, with her mouth opening and closing, while her hands move more actively, shifting positions and opening wider to accompany her speech. Her facial expressions remain focused and expressive as she communicates.
